headline: Textbook Controversy Over Revised History Syllabus 2026
context: The Form 4 history textbook revision sparked debate over coverage of May 13 and the social contract narrative.

cards.big: Revised Form 4 history textbook devotes only 2 paragraphs to May 13 1969
cards.sub: Previous edition had 4 pages covering multiple perspectives on the incident

cards.big: Dewan Bahasa dan Pustaka controls all public school textbook content since 1956
cards.sub: Editorial process involves MOE, state religious authorities, and political review

cards.big: National Archives declassified 847 May 13 documents in 2019 for public access
cards.sub: Textbook revision does not reference any newly available primary sources

cards.big: Singapore and Indonesia teach contested histories with multiple source analysis methods
cards.sub: Critical thinking approaches reduce ethnocentric bias in historical education

cards.big: History education that avoids difficult truths produces citizens unable to handle complexity
Should Malaysian history textbooks present multiple narratives of contested events
